title: Soyapango Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Soyapango, with a Z-Score of +3.63. This anomaly has reached a critical level, scoring 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Soyapango is causing extreme temperatures, with a CDD of 11.7 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 58%, while the wind speed is 19.1 km/h, offering little relief. 
 The lack of heating degree days, with an HDD of 0.0 GG, indicates that the heat wave is the primary concern.
conclusion: Activate emergency protocols to mitigate the heat wave's effects in Soyapango immediately.
